stemHtml: Contingency Fuel is carried to account for…

options.a: known factors that could have an influence on the fuel consumption to the alternate aerodrome.
options.b: unforeseen factors that could have an influence on the fuel consumption to the alternate aerodrome.
options.c: unforeseen factors that could have an influence on the fuel consumption to the destination aerodrome.
options.d: known factors that could have an influence on the fuel consumption to the destination aerodrome.
